title: heartland-synthetic: Synthetic heart-failure cohort generator with HEARTLAND risk variables
description: Python package that generates clinically-realistic synthetic heart-failure patient cohorts including the 10 HEARTLAND risk variables (distance-to-cardiology and social support) that Synthea and other generators do not model. Ships an exact port of the HEARTLAND Risk Score engine, AR(1) monthly time-series generator, 1-year outcome model, and REDCap / FHIR R4 exporters. Enables researchers to simulate validation studies, develop models, and teach HF risk assessment without needing real patient data.
